title: Hiring a Cleaner
scene: 你第一次请家政上门打扫。

turns.cn: 您好，两小时基础清洁一百二。
turns.en: Hi. Basic two-hour clean is a hundred twenty.

turns.cn: 厨房油污重，能重点擦吗？
turns.en: The kitchen grease is bad. Can you focus on that?

turns.cn: 可以，您有宠物吗？
turns.en: Sure. Do you have pets?

turns.cn: 一只猫，清洁用品在柜子里。
turns.en: One cat. Supplies are in the cabinet.

turns.cn: 贵重物品请收好，我换鞋套。
turns.en: Please put valuables away. I'll use shoe covers.

turns.cn: 每月两次，能固定周三吗？
turns.en: Twice a month. Can we lock in Wednesdays?

turns.cn: 可以，下次同一时间来。
turns.en: Yes. I'll come the same time next visit.

title: Move-Out Cleaning
scene: 你搬出公寓前请深度清洁拿押金。

turns.cn: 需要退房标准清洁，明天房东来检查。
turns.en: I need a move-out deep clean. The landlord inspects tomorrow.

turns.cn: 三室大概两百五，含烤箱和冰箱内。
turns.en: For a three-bedroom, about two fifty, including oven and fridge inside.

turns.cn: 地毯要蒸汽洗吗？
turns.en: Should we steam the carpets?

turns.cn: 建议洗，另加八十。
turns.en: I'd recommend it. Eighty extra.

turns.cn: 好，钥匙放门口地垫下。
turns.en: Okay. Leave the key under the doormat.

turns.cn: 完工拍照发您确认。
turns.en: I'll text photos when we're done.

turns.cn: 谢谢，押金就靠这个了。
turns.en: Thanks. I'm counting on this for my deposit.

title: Cleaning Complaint
scene: 家政打扫后你觉得浴室没清理干净。

turns.cn: 浴室瓷砖还是脏的，水龙头有水渍。
turns.en: The bathroom tiles are still dirty and the faucet has water spots.

turns.cn: 很抱歉，我安排明天免费返工。
turns.en: I'm sorry. I'll schedule a free touch-up tomorrow.

turns.cn: 今天能来吗？晚上有客人。
turns.en: Can someone come today? I have guests tonight.

turns.cn: 四点前派人，半小时搞定。
turns.en: We'll send someone before four. About thirty minutes.

turns.cn: 上次也漏了窗台。
turns.en: They missed the window sills last time too.

turns.cn: 我会备注在清单上。
turns.en: I'll add that to the checklist.

turns.cn: 好的，谢谢处理。
turns.en: Okay. Thanks for fixing it.

turns.cn: 三个房间地毯，报价一百八。
turns.en: Three carpeted rooms, quote is a hundred eighty.

turns.cn: 沙发也能一起洗吗？
turns.en: Can you do the sofa too?

turns.cn: 布艺沙发加六十，宠物味用酵素剂。
turns.en: Fabric sofa is sixty more. We use enzyme treatment for pet odors.

turns.cn: 洗完多久能干？
turns.en: How long until it's dry?

turns.cn: 六到八小时，开窗更快。
turns.en: Six to eight hours. Open windows to speed it up.

turns.cn: 周六上午方便吗？
turns.en: Does Saturday morning work?

turns.cn: 九点可以，请移开小家具。
turns.en: Nine AM works. Please move small furniture off the carpet.

title: Office Cleaning
scene: 你是小公司员工，和保洁沟通夜间清洁。

turns.cn: 今晚垃圾都倒了吗？
turns.en: Are all the trash bins emptied tonight?

turns.cn: 会议室的忘了，我现在去倒。
turns.en: I forgot the conference room. I'll dump it now.

turns.cn: 地板蜡下周做，请把椅子摞起来。
turns.en: We're waxing floors next week. Please stack the chairs.

turns.cn: 冰箱里的过期食物能扔吗？
turns.en: Can you toss expired food in the fridge?

turns.cn: 周五统一清理，贴个便签提醒大家。
turns.en: We clear it Fridays. Put a note reminding everyone.

turns.cn: 好的，谢谢。
turns.en: Will do. Thanks.

turns.cn: 记得锁门，我七点后来。
turns.en: Lock up. I'll be in after seven.
